THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARLOW, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 190 O'FARRELL ST, #603 $127.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $127.00, STAYED UNTIL DEC-01-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT EVICTION STAYED UNTIL AFTER 01-DEC-94; ON PAYMENT OF SUM OF $127.00 ON OR BEFORE 01-DEC-94, PLTF. SHALL CONTINUE THE EVICTION UNTIL 21-DEC-94; DEFT'S TENANCY SHALL NOT CONTINUE PAST 21-DEC-94; (SEE FILE FOR DETAILS).
